children.heading: Director
children.label: 1 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the National Science Foundation.

children.heading: HBCU
children.label: 2 HBCU
children.text: The term “HBCU” has the meaning given the term “part B institution” in .section 1061 of title 20

children.heading: Minority serving institution
children.label: 3 Minority serving institution
children.text: The term “minority serving institution” or “MSI” means Hispanic-Serving Institutions as defined in section 1101a) of title 20; Alaska Native Serving Institutions and Native Hawaiian-Serving Institutions as defined in ; and Predominantly Black Institutions, Asian American and Native American Pacific Islander-Serving Institutions, and Native American-Serving Nontribal Institutions as defined in .section 1059d of title 20section 1067q of title 20

children.heading: TCU
children.label: 4 TCU
children.text: The term “TCU” has the meaning given the term “Tribal College or University” in .section 1059c of title 20
